name: Conversation Starters
description: Deep questions, funny scenarios, and thought-provoking topics to spark amazing conversations.

prompts.text: If you didn't have to sleep, what would you do with the extra time?
What's the most useless talent you have?
If you could instantly become an expert in one subject, what would it be?
What is the best piece of advice you've ever received?
If your life was a movie, what genre would it be and who would play you?
